name: MoneyGram
description_short: New Orleans, LA's MoneyGram at 401 S Claiborne Ave offers check cashing and money transfers with extended weekday hours.
description_long:
MoneyGram in New Orleans, LA at 401 S Claiborne Ave provides check cashing and money transfer services. This standalone MoneyGram location is open Monday through Friday from 8 AM to 8 PM and Saturday 9 AM to 5 PM, making it convenient for New Orleans residents seeking quick financial services.

At this New Orleans MoneyGram branch, you can cash checks, send domestic and international money transfers, and access other financial services. For service inquiries or to confirm current offerings, call 504-529-5219.

When visiting the S Claiborne Ave location in New Orleans, bring a valid government ID and know that check cashing fees vary by check type. This MoneyGram offers a practical solution for quick cash needs in the area.
address: 401 S Claiborne Ave, New Orleans, LA 70112

company_info.headquarters: 401 S Claiborne Ave, New Orleans, LA 70112

pros: 36+ service locations across New Orleans for convenient in-person access
Extensive retail partner network including Walmart, CVS, and independent stores
Extended operating hours at many locations (some open until 11:59 PM)
Online and offline transfer options for flexibility
Searchable location finder by address, city, state, or ZIP code
Global money transfer capability to international recipients
Service available in underserved neighborhoods through local business partnerships
cons: Website provides no fee information, exchange rate details, or transfer cost transparency
No stated transfer speed or processing time guarantees on location page
No comparison of rates or services versus competitors like Western Union
Limited information about minimum/maximum transfer amounts or restrictions
Relies on third-party retail locations rather than dedicated customer service facilities
best_for: Customers sending money internationally to family or business contacts
Individuals without traditional bank accounts seeking accessible transfer services
People needing convenient, walk-in money transfer during extended retail hours
Customers in neighborhoods with limited banking infrastructure
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for customers needing accessible, flexible money transfer services through nearby retail locations with extended hours. The primary caveat is that the website lacks critical consumer information—fees, exchange rates, transfer speeds, and terms are not disclosed on the location directory, requiring customers to contact locations or visit the main site for pricing details before committing to a transfer.
services: Multiple payment method acceptance (implied through retail partners)
meta_description: New Orleans, LA: MoneyGram at 401 S Claiborne Ave. Check cashing and money transfers, extended hours.
